source: Vahan dashboard — fuel-type filter: 'Electric (BOV)' for 2WN + 2WIC + 2WT vehicle classes
notes: Registrations basis (not dispatches). Pre-FY20 EV 2W registrations were a rounding error. FY22 onwards reflects FAME-II + Ola/TVS/Bajaj/Ather ramp.

verification.method: Training-data estimate of Vahan-reported EV 2W share. FY22–FY25 widely reported by ICRA / CRISIL / analyst notes; confidence is higher for those years and lower for FY18–FY21.
verification.upgradePath: Vahan analytics extract (Vehicle Class 2WN/2WIC/2WT + Fuel: Electric (BOV)) or a working Vahan scraper in CI.
